title: AI Marketing Video Conferencing Tools Review: Zoom vs Google Meet vs Microsoft Teams for Small Business - 2026
description: Review Zoom, Google Meet, Microsoft Teams, and other AI marketing video conferencing tools for meetings and collaboration. Find the best marketing video co.
content:

Small businesses need video conferencing: meetings, collaboration, screen sharing. Video conferencing tools enable video calls, recording, and integrations.

Zoom Overview

Zoom is a leading tool for small businesses, offering professional Video Conferencing features.

  • Core Capabilities: Professional Video Conferencing, user-friendly interface, comprehensive features
  • Advantages: Small business friendly, professional features, easy to use

Summary Comparison

ToolFeaturesSmall Business FriendlyPriceBest For
ZoomStrongStrong$15/monthBest Video Conferencing
Google MeetStrongBestFreeFor small businesses

Recommendations

For small businesses, choose Google Meet for small business friendly features. For best Video Conferencing, choose Zoom. For analysis, choose Microsoft Teams. For enterprise, choose Webex. We recommend Google Meet for small businesses combined with Zoom for best Video Conferencing, for optimal results.
